title: aura-book: Convert Navbar.vue and ProductCard.vue to React JSX
summary: Converted Vue Navbar.vue and ProductCard.vue to React JSX components

details.Navbar.jsx: Dark sidebar with: logo (Link to /), nav items (Home, Products, Courses, Instructors, AI Agent), auth-gated items (Inbox, Support, Settings). Desktop: collapsible 220px->64px. Mobile: hamburger + slide-in sidebar + overlay. Uses useState for isCollapsed/isMobileOpen, useEffect for body class. Inline CSS with nav- prefix.
details.ProductCard.jsx: Product card with: image (aspect-ratio:1), title (2-line clamp), price in EGP, stock indicator, Add to Cart button. Redirects to /login if not logged in. Uses useCartStore.add and useAuthStore. Inline CSS with pc- prefix.

decisions: Inline <style> tags with unique prefixes instead of CSS modules
SVG icons inline to avoid icon library dependency
ProductCard Add to Cart button in separate div to avoid nested Link issue
